hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite non-existent or unverifiable papers with 2025 dates (e.g., DRIVE [Zhu et al., 2025], GHPO [Guo et al., 2025], Afterburner [Du et al., 2025], PRLCoder [Ye et al., 2025]). These appear fabricated as no matching real publications exist.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'DRIVE [Zhu et al., 2025]', 'GHPO [Guo et al., 2025]', 'Afterburner [Du et al., 2025]', 'PRLCoder [Ye et al., 2025]', and several marked '[Citation unverified]'.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: several nonexistent citations to fabricated 2025 papers. Experimental results, math, and methodology are consistent with provided code/logs (real 0% pass rate outcome).
